creator: js@jeannot.org
text:
Hi,

I'm not able to test the patch at the moment but it seems perfectly fine:
please commit it.

Thanks !

Regards,

js

> Maintainer of math/scilab,
>
> Please note that PR ports/101442 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/101442
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
